claim_text: Controlled worlds have programmatic gold A/U/N/C from independent world-physics (separate code path); the typed-graph analyzer recovers gold while a flat ledger misses derived/temporal claims.
statistical_support: deterministic; gold computed by independent recompute, not the analyzer
limitations: single 10-claim topology; the analyzer-vs-gold match is a consistency check, NOT a run-system result (it is gold-fed and reads gold values)
reviewer_attack: gold == method (tautology) -> reframed as consistency check

claim_text: Real agents (Claude/Codex) given an evidence-world delta recover only ~1/3 of obligated downstream updates (ACR 0.34-0.39, UCP~1.0).
statistical_support: direction-consistent across 2 families; UCP~1.0 is the dual of conservative under-editing; pilot-scale n=18 single-draw, no CIs
limitations: STRONGEST finding; needs CIs + scale + real-evidence layer

claim_text: Providing the typed-graph impact set raises a real model's ACR over the naive prompt.
statistical_support: NOT supported: hint did not help (ACR 0.33 vs 0.39); bottleneck is edit/re-derivation not identification
limitations: hint was 'possibly affected' -> may be weak-hint artifact; needs stronger ablation

claim_text: A NO-GOLD end-to-end pipeline (infer dependency structure from text + deterministic recompute) significantly beats naive report revision on affected-claim recall.
statistical_support: named: pipeline-naive Claude +0.75[0.58,0.92] Codex +0.46[0.25,0.67]; vague +0.92[0.79,1.0]/+0.48[0.29,0.69]; all CIs exclude 0; pipeline ACR 1.00; NO GOLD (verified)
limitations: controlled synthetic; parents NAMED in text; no real-evidence layer; single draw; 2 families
reviewer_attack: de-oracled (was a tautology) -> now a real result; full TACL needs real layer + human eval

claim_text: Deterministic gold-fed arm (ACR=UCP=1.0) is an UPPER-BOUND consistency check, not a run system.
statistical_support: oracle graph+recompute / full gold = 1.0; gold computed by independent recompute
limitations: labeled upper bound, kept distinct from the no-gold pipeline
reviewer_attack: do not present as a result

claim_text: An evidence-world delta induces a different obligated-change set than an equivalent author edit.
limitations: current diverge.py is an edge-partition ILLUSTRATION rigged to pass, NOT a falsifiable gate
reviewer_attack: needs a real author-edit reformulation baseline
